parsed.production_notes: The video consists of 2D vector animation and mobile app screencasts. There are no AI artifacts; the motion graphics are standard, intentional, and cleanly designed.

characters.appearance: A stylized, bright green owl with large eyes, a small orange beak, and orange feet. It has a simple, rounded vector-art design.
A woman with dark skin and black hair styled in a high bun. She has a simple vector-art facial structure.
characters.wardrobe: A yellow headband, a yellow short-sleeved top, and blue jeans.

characters.appearance: A woman with light skin and blonde hair. She has a sturdy build and simple vector-art features.
characters.wardrobe: A red tracksuit with white stripes and a red headband.

panels.panel_visual_description: A green owl mascot stands on a solid white background. The owl looks down at a small globe on a golden stand. The globe then magically transforms into a round mirror, and the owl gazes into its reflection.

scenes.visual_description: Duo the owl interacts with a globe that turns into a mirror. Green text overlays appear on screen asking about improving English and getting a dream job.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Want to improve your English and get your dream job?
scenes.on_screen_text:
Want to improve
your English
and get your dream job?

scenes.visual_description: A mobile phone screen displays a Duolingo 'Fill in the blank' exercise over a light blue background. The user selects the correct word, clicks continue, and a green success banner appears at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Try Duolingo's new advanced English lessons.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Try
Duolingo's new
advanced English lessons
Fill in the blank
I'll schedule our next meeting. Can you tell me a time ________ you'll be free?
what
who
when
CONTINUE
Correct!

panels.panel_visual_description: A woman with dark skin and a yellow headband jumps into the air, high-fiving a green owl mascot. A large, jagged yellow star shape bursts dynamically behind them. They are set against a solid purple background.

scenes.visual_description: Character B high-fives Character A against a purple background. Text overlays promote learning vocabulary and practicing speaking.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Learn essential vocabulary and practice speaking.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Learn essential vocabulary
and practice speaking

scenes.visual_description: A mobile phone screen shows a Duolingo speaking exercise over an orange background. An audio waveform animates as the user speaks, followed by a green 'Nice!' success banner.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: To take your basic English to the next level.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Take your basic English
to the next level
Speak this sentence
Your training with me is on Tuesday morning. I mean Thursday morning!
CAN'T SPEAK NOW
CONTINUE
Nice!

panels.panel_visual_description: A woman in a red tracksuit stands and flexes her right bicep confidently. A green owl mascot stands beside her, looking up at her with admiration. Small, animated spark elements appear around them against a solid white background.

scenes.visual_description: Character C flexes her arm next to Character A. A green text overlay reads 'for a better job'.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: For a better job.

scenes.visual_description: A mobile phone screen displays a reading comprehension exercise over a yellow background. The user selects an answer and a green success banner appears. Text overlays highlight that the app is free, fun, and effective.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: Would you mind giving me some tips on how to give presentations? I mostly just wrote reports at my last job.
Unknown speaker says: It's free, fun, and effective.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Read and respond
Would you mind giving me some tips on how to give presentations? I mostly just wrote reports at my last job.
He's...
giving advice
asking for advice
ignoring advice
CHECK
Good job!
It's free
It's fun
It's effective

scenes.visual_description: The Duolingo logo and app store download badges appear on a white background, encouraging viewers to download the app.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: Download Duolingo.
Unknown speaker says: The number one language learning app.
scenes.on_screen_text:
duolingo
Download the world's #1 language learning app.
Download on the App Store
GET IT ON Google Play
